questionHtml:
What decreases the activation energy of a reaction?

A.   Increasing the temperature

B.   Adding a catalyst

C.   Adding more reactants

D.   Increasing collision frequency of reactants

meta.title: What decreases the activation energy of a reaction? A. Increasing the temperature B. Adding a catalyst C. Adding more reactants D. Increasing collision frequency of reactants
